name: admin
description: System administrator with full platform access

name: user
description: Standard authenticated user

name: FederationAdmin
description: Cross-federation administrator with highest privileges

name: PlatformAdmin
description: Platform administrator for core infrastructure and operations

name: ServiceOperator
description: Operational role for managing platform services

name: WorkflowAdmin
description: Administrator for workflow configuration and governance

name: WorkflowApprover
description: Approves workflow actions and requests

name: WorkflowDesigner
description: Designs and maintains workflow definitions

name: WorkflowExecutor
description: Executes workflow tasks and actions

name: WorkflowViewer
description: Read-only access to workflow state and definitions

name: AnalyticsViewer
description: Read-only access to analytics dashboards and reports

name: AuditViewer
description: Read-only access to audit logs and compliance records

name: ConfigManager
description: Manages configuration across nem.* services

name: DataAdmin
description: Administrator for data access, governance, and lifecycle

name: DeploymentAdmin
description: Controls deployment operations and release management

name: MonitoringViewer
description: Read-only access to monitoring and observability data

name: PipelineAdmin
description: Administrator for CI/CD pipelines and automation flows

name: SandboxOperator
description: Operates sandbox environments for testing and validation

name: SkillAdmin
description: Administrator for skills lifecycle and governance

name: SkillExecutor
description: Executes approved skills and actions

name: SkillPublisher
description: Publishes skills for distribution and use

name: SkillReviewer
description: Reviews skills for quality and compliance

name: User
description: Knowhub tenant user with standard access

name: nem:admin
description: Namespaced administrative access for the nem ecosystem

description: Namespaced configuration administrator

name: nem:developer
description: Namespaced developer access

description: Namespaced end-user access
